summary: Good PowerShell module structure with proper Set-StrictMode, error handling, and parameter validation. Critical issues: (1) Workflow line 59–63 redundantly invokes `pwsh -File` from within `shell: pwsh`, violating the explicit instruction to use `shell: pwsh` directly—should be `./src/Get-LicenseReport.ps1` instead. (2) `actions/checkout@v4` and `actions/upload-artifact@v4` not pinned to full commit SHAs (supply chain security). (3) Missing `fixtures/` directory files required for default workflow paths, preventing standalone verification. (4) License lookups case-sensitive (fragile; package names should normalize to lowercase). Code quality is solid; delivery is incomplete.
